name: Spicy Street Food Noodles
intro: 1 tablespoon curry powder 1/2 teaspoon garlic powder 1/2 teaspoon ginger powder 1/2 teaspoon ground black pepper

ingredients.item: small red onion (finely chopped) 1/2 cup tofu (crumbled)

method: Place the noodles and water in a pot and cook over high heat for 5-6 minutes until the noodles have softened. Drain and set aside.

Heat the oil in a frying pan and add the scotch bonnet, onion, tofu, curry powder, garlic powder, ginger powder, black pepper and salt. Sauté over high heat for 5-6 minutes. Add the cooked noodles, chopped cucumber, tomato and spring onions. Mix well and serve hot.
